name: Pennsylvania Dutch Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet until crisp; remove and set aside, reserving 1 tablespoon drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. Sauté onion and water chestnuts in the reserved drippings until tender.
4. Drain beans, reserving half a cup of liquid.
5. Stir together the reserved liquid, brown sugar, and remaining ingredients. Mix well.
6. Add this mixture to the onion and water chestnut mixture; bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Stir in the drained beans and cook until thoroughly heated.
8. Sprinkle with crumbled bacon before serving.
(Note: For less fat, use turkey bacon and a non-stick skillet.)
